name: ginkgo-cloud-lab
tagline: Read-only reference catalog for selecting and ordering protein/RNA lab protocols on Ginkgo Bioworks Cloud Lab (cloud.ginkgo.bio).
verdict: Clean, low-risk skill: allowed-tools is restricted to Read, so it can only surface a protocol catalog and manual ordering steps for a named, legitimate biotech company's site -- it cannot itself submit orders, run code, or touch credentials. Minor quality nit: no explicit negative-trigger guidance.

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when...' guidance; a user could be steered toward this skill for unrelated bio-lab work it doesn't cover.
